_comment: Asset registry for Air Twin. Links physical device instances to their device profiles. One entry per physical device deployed. Room geometry and placement context live here — these are asset-specific facts, not device-specific facts.

starkvind_01._comment: Single IKEA Starkvind E2007 instance. Primary air purifier for the L-shaped room.

room._volume_comment: Derived from physical measurements. To be validated against Polycam mesh. See config.json for breakdown.

placement._section_comment: Narrow leg of L-shaped room. Dimensions 13'6" x 10'6" (4.11m x 3.20m).
placement._position_comment: World-space coordinates to be populated from Blender scene at export time. Purifier object origin in the scene is the authoritative position. Do not enter manually — derive from geometry pipeline. Approximate physical location: ~4ft from one short wall of narrow section, ~7ft from junction wall.

filter._filter_comment: Factory default. SKU 004.619.49 ships with particle filter only. Update via QR maintenance event when filter is changed.
filter._anchor_comment: device_age (minutes) at time of last confirmed filter change. Null on first run — no confirmed filter change on record. Twin uses filter_age as best available estimate with lower confidence until first QR-logged change.
filter._last_type_comment: Filter type recorded at last QR-logged filter change. Null until first logged change. Twin uses default_filter_type from device profile until populated.

starkvind_01._commissioned_comment: ISO8601 timestamp of first successful twin engine reading. Populated automatically by twin engine on first run.
starkvind_01.notes: Zigbee dongle firmware updated to 8.0.2 before pairing. Factory firmware 7.4.5 would not pair with this device. Pairing button located inside unit behind front panel — not the external knob.

sds011_01.notes: SDS011 PM2.5 sensor. Mounted approximately 3ft (0.914m) off floor. Physically separated from Starkvind — cross-reference disagreement at rest is expected.
